ItacPersonItem.Notes: Physician and philosopher, professor pf Philosophy at the Bolognese Studium. See his biography by Giorgio Stabile in DBI. According to Stabile, Betti was also member of the Gelati Academy.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
